title: Rent Due Date
text: Monthly rent is due on the 1st of each month. Payments received after the 5th are considered late.

title: Late Fee
text: A late fee of $75 applies if rent is not received by the 5th of the month.

title: Parking
text: One assigned parking space is included. Additional vehicles require management approval and a $50 monthly fee.

title: Utilities
text: Tenant pays electricity and internet. Water and trash are included in rent.

title: Noise and Quiet Hours
text: Quiet hours are 10:00 PM to 8:00 AM daily. Excessive noise complaints may result in lease violation notices.

title: Security Deposit
text: Security deposit will be returned within 21 days after move-out, minus lawful deductions for damage beyond normal wear and tear.

title: Renters Insurance
text: Tenant must maintain renters insurance with at least $100,000 liability coverage for the full lease term.

title: Guests
text: Guests may stay up to 14 consecutive days without written approval. Longer stays require management consent.

title: Move-Out Cleaning
text: Unit must be returned broom-clean with all personal items removed. Professional carpet cleaning is required if stains are present.

title: Rent Due Date
text: Rent is due on the first day of each month. A grace period applies until the 5th before late fees are assessed.

title: Storage Locker
text: One storage locker may be rented for $35 per month subject to availability and a separate addendum.

title: Noise and Quiet Hours
text: Tenants must keep noise to a reasonable level at all times. Quiet hours are from 10 PM to 8 AM.

title: Smoking
text: Smoking and vaping are prohibited inside the unit and on balconies. Designated outdoor areas only.

title: Security Deposit
text: Deposit refunds are processed within 21 days after lease end, itemized deductions may include unpaid rent and repair costs.

title: Renters Insurance
text: Proof of active renters insurance is required at move-in and upon renewal.

title: Water Leak Reporting
text: Tenants must report water leaks, dampness, or moisture within 24 hours to prevent property damage.

title: Keys and Access
text: Lost keys or fobs incur a $50 replacement fee. Do not duplicate keys without management approval.

title: Early Termination
text: Early lease termination requires 60 days written notice and a fee equal to two months rent unless otherwise approved.
